notes: Generic AI coding agent execution rules and the full n8n operating ruleset were rehomed from n8n.local-setup into this development module. The toolkit skill-routing partial was moved exactly from a same-repo linked root surface and is documented in SOURCE-MANIFEST.md rather than represented as an upstream source_path in this retired n8n source lock.

files.notes: Moved from the n8n local setup partial source during the source-ownership split, then retained as the one canonical reusable toolkit prompt partial. It remains toolkit-adapted relative to the retired upstream source, with GitHub/PR/VCS publication approval workflow wording omitted from the default reusable toolkit prompt.

Moved from n8n.local-setup into the ai-coding-agent-rules project because this is an agent operating ruleset. The moved rules were renamed and strengthened with explicit n8n_docs before n8n_live, webhook ID, and staticData guidance while preserving live-action approval gates.
